name: cadence
description: Focus music for Claude Code. Detects your current work mode and plays Spotify music matched to the task, learning your taste over time.

spotify_client_id.title: Spotify Client ID
spotify_client_id.description: Client ID from your own Spotify app (developer.spotify.com/dashboard). Register a Redirect URI of 127.0.0.1 (loopback, WITHOUT a port). Each user needs their own app — Spotify dev-mode caps apps at 5 users.

market.title: Spotify market
market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. US, GB, BR). Required because Spotify dev-mode no longer exposes your account country.

default_vibe.title: Default vibe
default_vibe.description: Vibe slug used when no work mode is detected: deep-focus, steady-flow, wordless-write, open-think, calm-read, alert-study, momentum, decompress, drive.

auto_switch.title: Auto-switch music
auto_switch.description: Let Cadence detect your work mode and switch music automatically. Toggle any time with /cadence auto.

enable_local_fallback.title: Local player fallback
enable_local_fallback.description: On Linux (playerctl/MPRIS) or macOS (AppleScript), control the desktop Spotify app for play/pause/next when you lack Premium or no Web API device is active.

data_dir.title: Data directory override
data_dir.description: Where to store learned preferences and state. Defaults to the plugin data dir, which survives updates.
